items.title: hololive x Gundam Collab Teases Exclusive Gunpla Kits as First Wave Unveiled
items.author: James Richardson
items.content: Bandai has officially revealed the first wave of an exciting new crossover project blending the worlds of a legendary mecha franchise and a massively popular virtual idol agency.

items.title: Official hololive Store Set to Open in Tokyo This April with Exclusive Merchandise
items.author: Charlotte Davis
items.content: Fans of the world's most popular virtual idols can soon experience a brand new retail destination situated in the heart of Japan's bustling fashion capital.

items.title: hololive x Gundam Collab Officially Announced by Bandai and Cover Corp
items.author: James Richardson
items.content: Bandai and Cover Corp have officially announced a collaboration between the Gundam series and the VTuber agency hololive production.

items.title: Capcom Announces Second Palico-Themed Monster Hunter x hololive Collab
items.author: James Richardson
items.content: Capcom has officially announced the second wave of a collaboration that combines popular VTubers with the newest entry in their flagship hunting franchise, Monster Hunter Wilds.
